data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria verified: AC1 (validate.sh shim-refs) PASS, AC2 (validate.sh --ci shim-refs check itself) PASS, AC3 (no RED markers) PASS, AC5 (ruff) PASS.
